title: Settings
subtitle: Personalize the app for yourself
defaultSectionHint: This section will open when you log in
notificationsNotSupported: Your browser doesn't support notifications. Try Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari.
notificationsBlocked: Notifications are blocked by the browser. Allow notifications in site settings and refresh the page.
notificationsDescription: Get browser notifications when task reminders are due. Notifications appear even when the app is minimized.
notificationsBlockedMsg: Notifications are blocked by the browser. Allow them in site settings.
aboutAppDescription: Task management app with PWA support
resetUiDescription: Reset all UI settings (filters, collapsed sections, open tabs, etc.)
timezoneHint: Select a timezone for correct display of times in reminders and deadlines
customTimezoneLabel: Or enter your timezone (IANA format, e.g.: Europe/Moscow)
passwordRequirements: At least 8 characters, one digit, one uppercase letter, and one special character
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordNeedDigit: Password must contain at least one digit
passwordNeedUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
passwordNeedSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character
passwordSameAsCurrent: New password is the same as current
passwordChangedBody: Your password has been updated successfully
confirmBlock: Are you sure you want to block this user?
confirmUnblock: Are you sure you want to unblock this user?
confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
